/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/SilKitRegistryTests.dir/__/__/__/SilKit/cmake/SilKitTest/SilKitTestMain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SilKitRegistryTests.dir/Test_RegistryConfiguration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/O_SilKitRegistry_Config.dir/RegistryConfiguration.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/Configuration.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/ParticipantConfiguration.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/ParticipantConfigurationFromXImpl.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/Validation.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/YamlParser.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/YamlReader.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/YamlWriter.cpp.o ../../../SilKit/source/config/CMakeFiles/O_SilKit_Config.dir/YamlValidator.cpp.o -o ../../../Release/SilKitRegistryTests  ../../../lib/libgtest.a ../../../lib/libgmock.a ../../../SilKit/source/libS_SilKitImpl.a ../../../lib/libgtest.a -ldl ../../../ThirdParty/_tp_spdlog/libspdlog.a ../../../ThirdParty/_tp_fmt/libfmt.a ../../../ThirdParty/_tp_rapidyaml/librapidyaml-static.a
